prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel one clean flat square block, no smaller detail, gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered clockwork-fantasy item in three-quarter display angle: a hunter's mechanical repeater crossbow with a coiled brass mainspring drum at its heart and taut verdigris-metal limbs. Leave at least two full magenta cells of clearance on every edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else in frame. Use only Unwound Belfry colours — brass and tarnished-brass metal, verdigris patina, candle-ivory highlights, cold glass-teal accents, deep indigo shadows, one restrained alarm-red accent (8–12 flat colours). No brown or tan beyond brass, no cyan, no pure white, no pure black. Structural members at least 3 logical pixels thick. No shadow, glow, sparkle, particles, text, watermark, or transparency.
note: #608 Tier-5 Unwound Belfry Equipment Base icon
